source.scope: Official-source-backed Lesotho resident annual individual income tax with personal credit and non-resident annual income tax for income year 2026-27.

LS.notes: Resident 20% and 30% marginal schedule with non-refundable personal credit, plus separate non-resident 25% schedule. PAYE period calculations and taxable-income derivation remain outside scope.

register.coverageSummary: Resident annual chargeable income with personal tax credit and non-resident annual chargeable income for 2026-27.
